rows.label: qev050908_MSG0001
rows.name:
Could I ask you to act as a
representative of the Earthlings and
help explain my aptitude as a liaison?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050908_MSG0002
rows.name:
If there is an opinion from the Earthlings'
side, I feel the Platoon Commander might be
more inclined to give a favorable judgment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050908_MSG0003
rows.name:
To the BLADE over there... A
Bloodied Face, Reinforced Blade
Parts, and Next-Gen Main Core Parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050908_MSG0004
rows.name:
I am truly sorry... I
am counting on you...[ST:wait ]
